content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.39%, Bank Nifty -0.75%, VIX +2.59% to 17.05 — broad market slightly risk-off but pockets of strength (IT +0.68%, Pharma +0.51%) on Q4 results-driven moves. Book is +1.5% today on broad-based Q4 outperformance across holdings; priority is locking gains via SL trails rather than chasing extended breakouts (POLYCAB, COFORGE, SRF, PIDILIT all +8-15% today and stretched).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1064.67,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +9.7%. Current SL 1064.67 already at +8.2% lock-in (well above entry). CMP 1083.60 gives ~1.7% cushion to SL — within the 1% trail-gap floor only marginally. Keep SL where it is; bullish Q4, brokerage TPs to 1260, but stock at +30% in a month and within 7% of 52w high. Holding HOLD-equivalent — no change to SL (already aggressive trail in our favor)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, -0.4% unrealized. SL 121 = -3.3% from entry, intact. VIX rising +2.59%, hedge thesis still relevant. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +4.8%. CMP 4790, SL 4725.56 = ~1.35% gap (within 1% floor compliance). Q4 results May 14 — binary catalyst within 4 sessions. Per Rule 11, default disposition for held position into binary event is exit/trim or tighten SL. SL already at +3.3% lock vs entry. Keeping current SL (already tight enough to cap binary tail at small profit). No change to SL/target — HOLD-equivalent MODIFY removed; this is a no-op so converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.2%. CMP 7043, SL 6960 = 1.18% gap (just above 1% floor). Q4 was excellent (PAT +124%, EBITDA margin +875bps), already printed. Stock at lifetime highs; SRF read-through positive. Leave SL at 6960 — tighter would self-stopout on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.8%. CMP 365.50, SL 365.00 = 0.14% gap — already at SL. This is the rule-17 spot: do NOT preempt the SL. Q4 PAT +31%, lending portfolio crossed Rs 2 lakh cr. Thesis intact. Let SL do its job; no new info post-entry justifies preempt-exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.3%. SL 822 already above entry 820 (breakeven+). CMP 830.60, SL 822 = 1.04% gap, just above 1% floor. Q4 print clean, FMCG defensive on risk-off day. Keep SL 822 — no change (no-op, converting to HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.9%. CMP 1351.20, SL 1329.47 = 1.61% gap. Already trailed to lock +5.6% gain. +15.6% today, FY26 PAT +91.6%, near vertical post-Q4. SL already aggressive; further tightening risks 1%-floor breach on intraday noise. Keep current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.4%. CMP 3062.50, SL 2998 = 2.1% gap. FY26 revenue +38%, PAT +42%, defense theme intact, Antique TP 3141. Allow room to run to 3225 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +4.5%. CMP 842.60, SL 827.41 = 1.80% gap. Already trailed above entry (+2.7% lock). Record Q4, near 52w high. Keep current SL — sufficient gap, no change (no-op)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7%. Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps — strong print just released today. Stock +8.6% today but pulled back from highs to 1481 (intraday high 1515). SL 1445 = 2.4% below CMP, intact. Thesis just confirmed by results — let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.1%. Q4 results JUST printed today — PBT +115%, US sales +46%, Glycerol approval (Ravicti generic). Stock spiked to 2475 then faded to 2433. SL 2400 = 1.4% below CMP, intact. Thesis just got stronger; do not preempt SL on results-day fade."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.2%. Q4 turnaround (loss to PAT +Rs 164cr, EBITDA margin 20.3% vs 10.7%). SL 1580 = 2.2% below CMP. Brokerage TP 1870. Hold to target/SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held flat. SRF +10.27% today, Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 PAT +46.7%. CMP 2782, SL 2700 = 2.95% gap. Thesis fresh, target 2920 = 5% upside. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.1% (just entered). +9.19% today on record Q4 (FY26 revenue +29%, PAT +32%). CMP 9103.50, SL 8800 = 3.3% gap. Brokerage TPs Rs 9800. Thesis intact; allow room."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 25@2015 placed 388 min ago. Auto-cluster with Auto theme; deployment already at 67%, 11+ holdings. CMP not provided here but pending order remains. Do not stack; do not cancel (let it work or expire by EOD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 sitting 3268 min (over 2 days) old — this should have been cancelled prior session. Cancelling now via order-management is outside this schema; flagging for engine cleanup. Do not stack."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1064.67, "reasoning": "SL already at +8% lock, leave alone. CMP/SL gap 1.7% adequate."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, slight loss within tolerance."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4725.56, "reasoning": "Q4 binary May 14 (4 sessions). SL already +3.3% above entry — locks gain even on adverse Q4 print. Per Rule 11 option (b), tight SL pre-event."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "Trail at breakeven+; CMP/SL gap 1.18% — at 1%-floor edge, do not tighten further."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 365.00, "reasoning": "CMP at SL. Per Rule 17, let SL fire if it must — don't preempt. Q4 strong, thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 822.00, "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+. Adequate."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1329.47, "reasoning": "Already trailed +5.6%. 1.6% gap from CMP — within tolerance."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2998.00, "reasoning": "Adequate room to target 3225."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 827.41, "reasoning": "+2.7% lock. 1.8% gap, sufficient."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1445.00, "reasoning": "Q4 just printed strong; leave SL room."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2400.00, "reasoning": "Q4 just printed strong — do not preempt SL on results-day fade."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Turnaround intact; allow room."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2700.00, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, let work."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 8800.00, "reasoning": "Fresh entry post-record Q4."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through new BULLISH candidates per Rule 18: TATATECH (NEUTRAL -0.05, brokerage Sell consensus, TP below CMP, valuation stretched 30x — REJECT), THERMAX/FINCABLES/BHARATFORG (capital goods cluster — already hold HAL, GRSE, POLYCAB; Rule 10 cluster cap reached — REJECT new admits), GABRIEL/BHARATFORG (auto cluster — already have BHARATFORG OPEN order — REJECT additional), KPIL/RAMCOCEM/NH (acceptable BULLISH but deployment at 67%, only Rs 136K remaining deployable, and 11 active CNC positions — admin cap reasonable; would also add to construction/healthcare clusters where I already hold positions). LAURUSLABS (already 2 pharma holdings LUPIN+WOCKPHARMA — pharma cluster cap), TITAGARH (defense cluster, GRSE already held). Net: deployment 67%, 14 holdings is high-end of diversification. Capital preservation priority over admit-stretch into extended breakouts. SOBHA: re-entry cooldown still active.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 67% with 14 CNC positions is at structural diversification limit; cluster-cap binding across BFSI (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS), Capital Goods (HAL+GRSE+POLYCAB), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR+SRF+PIDILITIND), Pharma (LUPIN+WOCKPHARMA). Today +1.5% on broad Q4 results outperformance — focus is preserving the gain. HAL Q4 May 14 binary already managed via SL-above-entry (+3.3% lock). 5-day win rate 15% concerning but profit factor 1.1x and unrealized +13.9K is meaningful — letting trends run with disciplined SLs is the right play. No new admits this tick — book is full and gains are being locked, not chased."
}
